somali.daily_bonus_ready: Abaalka maalinlaha ah wuu diyaar yahay!
somali.essence_scales_with_how_many_source_to: Nuxurku wuxuu kordhaa marka la eego inta qalab-asal ee aad tababartay.
somali.sage_spells_unlock_when_you_make_progr: Sixirka Xikmadlaha wuxuu furmaa marka aad horumar ka gaadho qalabka kale ee STEM Lab — Baadhaha Hawada, Shaybaadhka Xisaabta, RoadReady iyo wixii la mid ah. Sixir kastaa waa awood dib-u-soo-celin-tababar — waxaad ku dhawaaqdaa adigoo ka jawaabaya su’aal ka timid goobta qalabkaas.
somali.scroll_down_to_yet_to_discover_and_cli: Hoos u soco ilaa «Weli lama helin» ka dibna riix badhanka
somali.button_that_ll_take_you_to_the_tool_th: ee sixir kasta. Wuxuu ku geyn doonaa qalabka furaya.
somali.allobot_is_watching_your_progress_ever: AlloBot wuxuu meel kasta ka daawanayaa horumarkaaga. Hawl, dhibaato ama tababar keliya oo qalab kale ku jira ayaa halkan ka bilaabi doona furitaanka sixirka.
somali.open_study_hall_untimed_practice_mode: Fur Qolka Waxbarashada — habka tababar aan wakhti lahayn
somali.untimed_drill_no_damage_full_explanati: Tababar aan wakhti lahayn · Wax dhaawac ah ma jiro · Sharraxaad buuxda
somali.ai_scaffolds_while_learner_does_most_o: AI wuxuu bixiyaa taageero halka ardaygu qabanayo inta badan shaqada garaadka. Waxbarasho dhab ah + amni macquul ah.
somali.real_learning_happens_with_ai_assist_t: Waxbarasho dhab ah waxay dhacdaa iyadoo la kaashanayo AI. Isweydaarsigu waa dheelitiran yahay.
somali.some_learning_some_risk_watch_for_over: Waxbarasho yar, khatar yar. Iska ilaali ku-tiirsanaan xad-dhaaf ah si tartiib ah.
somali.high_error_cost_low_learner_effort_ai_: Qarash qalad oo sarreeya + dadaal arday oo hooseeya + AI oo wareega ku jira = natiijooyin u muuqda kuwo sax ah laakiin aan waaraya ficil ahaan.
somali.ai_doing_all_the_work_learner_gets_ans: AI wuxuu qabanayaa shaqada oo dhan. Ardaygu wuxuu helayaa jawaabo laakiin ma fahmayo. Xirfadaha way yaraadaan ama waligood ma koraan.
somali.ai_workload_inquiry_who_is_doing_the_t: 🔬 Baadhista Culeyska Shaqada AI — Yaa fikiraya?
somali.set_ai_assistance_level_learner_effort: Dhig heerka caawimaadda AI, dadaalka ardayga, cusbaynta hawsha iyo qarashka qaladka. Qiyaas xaaladda waxbarashada. Dhibco ma jiraan, muujin ma jirto.
somali.your_hypothesis_when_does_ai_assist_he: Mala-awaalkaaga (Goorma ayay caawimaadda AI caawinaysaa halkii ay dhaawici lahayd? Xariiqda xaggee ayaad ka sameyneysaa?)
somali.e_g_on_high_novelty_tasks_ai_is_a_brai: tusaale, hawlaha cusub AI waa lammaane fikir-abuur; hawsha caadiga ah wuxuu gaabiyaa xirfadda...
somali.ai_assist_learner_effort_sums_to_100_w: Caawimaadda AI + dadaalka ardayga wadar > 100 — maxay caawimaad xad-dhaaf ah ku sameysaa faaiidada waxbarashada?
somali.why_does_novelty_matter_for_both_learn: Maxay cusbayntu muhiim ugu tahay waxbarashada iyo khatarta labadaba?
somali.when_is_ai_doing_90_of_the_work_actual: Goorma ayaa AI oo qabanaya 90% shaqada ah go’aan sax ah dhab ahaantii? (Tilmaan: qarash qalad oo hooseeya, cusbayn hooseysa, wax-soo-saar cadaadis wakhti leh.)
somali.how_would_you_design_a_class_where_ai_: Sidee ayaad u naqshadayn lahayd fasal halka AI la oggol yahay laakiin waxbarashadu aysan gaabin?
somali.i_can_explain_why_this_ai_effort_novel: Waan sharxi karaa sababta isku-darka AI/dadaal/cusbayn/qarash uu u siiyo xaaladdan.
somali.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Aaladda baadhista — dhibco ma jiraan, muujin ma jirto, jawaab lama sheegayo. «Faaiidada waxbarashada» waa qiyaas; cabbir dhab ah wuxuu u baahan yahay qiimayn ka hor/ka dib, hawlo wareejin iyo baadhitaan hayn. Saameynta caawimaadda AI way ku kala duwan tahay goobta (hal-abuur vs farsamo vs milicsi).
somali.equip_up_to_3_spells_you_can_only_cast: Diyaari ilaa 3 sixir. Safarkan waxaad ku dhawaaqi kartaa oo keliya sixirka la diyaariyey.
somali.pick_what_fits_today_you_can_change_th: Dooro waxa maanta ku habboon. Tan waxaad ka bedeli kartaa safar kasta. Adkaan sare = abaal nuxur weyn.
somali.no_presets_yet_build_a_loadout_you_lik: Weli diyaarin ma jirto. Dhis qalab aad jeceshahay, ka dibna riix «Kaydi kan hadda» si aad ugu haysato mar dambe.
somali.static_questions_never_run_out_gemini_: Su’aalaha go’an waligood ma dhammaadaan — Gemini wuxuu isla markiiba abuuraa kuwo cusub.
somali.ai_generated_questions_can_be_wrong_ev: ⚠️ Su’aalaha AI abuuray waxay noqon karaan qalad (xataa jawaabta la calaamadeeyay) — haddii wax la yaab leh u muuqdaan u sheeg macallinkaaga.
somali.research_specific_goals_improve_perfor: Cilmi-baaris: yoolal gaar ah waxay hagaajiyaan waxqabadka + feejignaanta. Dooro mid kasta.
somali.rewards_fast_correct_retrieval: Waxay abaalmarisaa dib-u-soo-celin degdeg ah + sax ah
somali.use_all_3_equipped_spells: Isticmaal dhammaan 3 sixir ee la diyaariyey
somali.rewards_versatility_not_one_trick: Waxay abaalmarisaa kala-duwanaan, ma aha hal-farsamo
somali.crit_during_the_winding_phase: Sameeq muhiim inta lagu jiro wejiga diyaarinta
somali.land_a_critical_cast_correct_under_6_s: Ku guulayso ku-dhawaaq muhiim ah (sax + ka hooseeya 6 ilbiriqsi) si aad u joojiso oo aad u yarayso dhaawaca.
somali.calibrated_you_said_you_knew_it_and_yo: 🎯 La habeeyay: waxaad tidhi waad garanaysay — waanad garanaysay.
somali.overconfident_felt_sure_but_missed_wor: ⚠ Kalsooni xad-dhaaf ah: waad hubtay laakiin waad seegtay. Waxay u qalantaa eegis labaad Qolka Waxbarashada.
somali.lucky_guess_but_maybe_you_knew_more_th: 🎁 Mala-awaal nasiib leh — laakiin waxaa laga yaabaa inaad garanaysay wax ka badan intaad moodday!
somali.self_aware_you_flagged_the_doubt_and_t: 🎯 Is-garasho: waxaad calaamadaysay shakiga, shakiguna wuu saxnaa. Ku dar dib-u-eegista.
somali.ai_generated_question_the_marked_answe: Su’aal AI abuuray — jawaabta la calaamadeeyay waxay noqon kartaa qalad. Haddii ay la yaab tahay u sheeg macallinka.
somali.use_all_3_equipped_spells_2: Isticmaal dhammaan 3 sixir ee la diyaariyey
somali.accuracy_by_stated_confidence_well_cal: Saxnaan iyadoo la eegayo kalsoonida la sheegay; xariiqyada si fiican loo habeeyay waxay ka koraan «mala-awaal» ilaa «waan garanayay».
somali.re_study_what_you_got_wrong_mark_got_i: Dib u baro waxa aad qaldantay. Marka aad fahamto calaamadi «Hadda waan fahmay».
somali.overconfidence_detected: Kalsooni xad-dhaaf ah waa la ogaaday
somali.what_is_one_thing_you_learned_or_notic: Waa maxay hal shay oo aad bartay ama aad ogaatay orodkan? (Qorista waxay xusuusta ka xoojisaa fikirka.)
somali.e_g_the_bee_flower_question_keeps_trip: tusaale, «Su’aasha shinnida/ubaxa ayaa had iyo jeer i wareeriya — is-dhaafsi = labadaba way faa’iidaystaan»
somali.spend_essence_to_deepen_the_runes_of_e: Ku bixi nuxur si aad u qoto-dheerayso calaamadaha sixir kasta. Heer sare = dhaawac saldhig oo badan + garaacyo waaweyn oo muhiim ah.
somali.no_spells_to_upgrade_yet_unlock_spells: Weli sixir la kordhiyo ma jiro. Fur sixirka adigoo ciyaaraya qalabka kale ee STEM Lab.
somali.untimed_practice_no_hp_no_damage_just_: Tababar aan wakhti lahayn. HP ma jiro. Dhaawac ma jiro. Dib-u-soo-celin + sharraxaad keliya. Su’aalaha aad qaldantay dhaqso ayay soo noqdaan.
somali.no_spells_unlocked_yet_play_other_stem: Weli sixir lama furin. Ciyaar qalabka kale ee STEM Lab si aad u furto sixirka, ka dibna halkan ku soo noqo tababar.
somali.no_questions_in_the_review_queue_eithe: Su’aalo kuma jiraan safka dib-u-eegista. Ama kuma aad ciyaarin wax ku filan ama aad si fiican u samaynaysaa. Isku day Qolka Waxbarashada tababar khatar yar ama bilow safar.
somali.question: ❓ Su’aal
somali.cast_each_spell_at_least_3_times_to_se: Ku dhawaaq sixir kasta ugu yaraan 3 jeer si aad u aragto awoodahaaga ugu fiican.
somali.no_weak_spots_flagged_yet_keep_casting: Weli meelo daciif ah lama calaamadin. Sii wad ku-dhawaaqidda!
somali.when_you_say_you_know_it_and_you_do_th: Marka aad tidhaahdo «waan garanayaa» oo aad dhab ahaantii garanayso — taasi waa habaynta. Is-waafaqid la’aan (kalsooni xad-dhaaf/hooseeya) waa qarashka qarsoon ee waxbarashada.
somali.no_reflections_saved_yet_after_each_ex: Weli milicsi lama kaydin. Safar kasta ka dib qor hal shay oo aad ogaatay ama aad bartay. Adiga mustaqbalka wuxuu ku mahadin doonaa adiga hadda.
